ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the software product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the software product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the software version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the software version file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the downloadable file */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the software */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the software */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the download was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, customer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., download_software, upload_software) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version status */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the software version (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved or rejected the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was approved or rejected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_status_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_status_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the software version */,
  "unique_downloads" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who downloaded the software */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the software version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., download, view) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the software version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the software category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software-category mapping */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_category_mapping_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES software_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-group mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_mapping_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group permission */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id")
)
